title: Eternal Starlight x Cobblemon
description: This datapack adds spawns to the Eternal Starlight dimension for Cobblemon!
body:
This comprehensive spawn datapack adds 300+ carefully curated Pokemon spawns across all 14 biomes in the Eternal Starlight dimension. Each biome has been meticulously themed with Pokemon that fit its unique atmosphere! Ranging from the shadowy Starlight Forests to the frigid Permafrost regions and the mysterious Abyss!

This pack was created for my up-coming Modpack "Cobblemon (RPG)"!

Features!

300+ Pokemon across 14 fully populated biomes
28 Legendary Pokemon (2 per biome)
Exclusive fishing spawns in 6 water biomes
Themed encounters - Pokemon match each biome's atmosphere
Day/night spawns - Some Pokemon only appear in darkness
Endgame content - Dense Forests feature higher level Pokemon
Perfect for: Modpack creators, server owners, and players who want a fully-featured Pokemon experience in the Eternal Starlight dimension!

All the spawns! :

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1emkS4h3PYbORXpqR05cxLsGGLQXjyTAt9xN5cGN11Yw/edit?usp=sharing

</details>

Installation:

Download the datapack
Place in world/datapacks or Open Loader's/Other datapack loaders data folder
Run /reload
Start exploring!
Requires: Cobblemon 1.6.1+ and Eternal Starlight mod

Also check out:

Tropicraft x Cobblemon!
Bygone x Cobblemon!

This project can also be found on Curseforge!

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/eternal-starlight-x-cobblemon
